TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Rungeung = Ngayan qhuni ka rungeung nii, qhuni rungeung nii we leexan riyung ngungalan, ado ka hmeru ssiyo deriq ma ayu alang ma, ani knuwan saan gmeyu ge niqan. Kika qbulic qhuni rungeung nii ka ngalan miyan mpbhege ware ttinun ka yami Seediq, rudan rungeung nii de mqhuni paru duri denu, malu riyung srehaq duri. Mpbhege ware Cbeyo we uka miyan iyu mpsrako ware ka yami Seediq,ani si niqan knkela na ka rudan miyan, meniq ka ware bhege we snpuwan daha hmanguc qbulic rungeung. Mosa gmeyu qhuni rungeung mdengu hayan ma pthuun daha, sliyan hii ka qbulic na ma spuun hmanguc qbulic nii ka nuqah qnqihan, kika mbhege ka nuqah qnqihan denu. Rako ware nSeediq Rheqan ka rehaq na rungeung de pthuun mesa duma rudan ma, ani naq ini rheqi mesa ka duma rudan, anu ka qblic rehaq na ka rmabang bhege hnungedan na mesa. Rako ware miyan cbeyo we teru ba klegan, kika bhege, tanah ma qalux, ani si niqan ka mgsama duri mesa ka duma rudan. Rako tanah we nungalan tpelaq, rako qalux we knrebu dheran mqalux, meniq ka rako mgsama we nungalan waso sero. Pteumal pptasun Tiwas Pawan,Iwan Lawa,Seta Iban ma Robo Pihu ka smneeru Dakis Pawan ka smnnetur
S.PHON: = …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč = Ňčajan qńßuni ka …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč nii, qńßuni …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč nii w…ô l…ô…ôxan …ĺijuŇč ŇčuŇčalan, ado ka ńßm…ô…ĺu ssijo d…ô…ĺiq ma aju alaŇč ma, ani knuwan saan gm…ôu g…ô niqan. kika qbuli ¶ qńßuni …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč nii ka Ňčalan mijan mpbńß…ôg…ô wa…ĺ…ô ttinun ka jami s…ô…ôdiq, …ĺudan …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč nii d…ô mqńßuni pa…ĺu du…ĺi d…ônu, malu …ĺijuŇč s…ĺ…ôńßaq du…ĺi. mpbńß…ôg…ô wa…ĺ…ô ¶b…ôo w…ô uka mijan iju mps…ĺako wa…ĺ…ô ka jami s…ô…ôdiq,ani si niqan knk…ôla na ka …ĺudan mijan, m…ôniq ka wa…ĺ…ô bńß…ôg…ô w…ô snpuwan dańßa ńßmaŇču ¶ qbuli ¶ …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč. mosa gm…ôu qńßuni …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč md…ôŇču ńßajan ma ptńßuun dańßa, slijan ńßii ka qbuli ¶ na ma spuun ńßmaŇču ¶ qbuli ¶ nii ka nuqańß qnqińßan, kika mbńß…ôg…ô ka nuqańß qnqińßan d…ônu. …ĺako wa…ĺ…ô ns…ô…ôdiq …ĺńß…ôqan ka …ĺ…ôńßaq na …ĺuŇč…ôuŇč d…ô ptńßuun m…ôsa duma …ĺudan ma, ani naq ini …ĺńß…ôqi m…ôsa ka duma …ĺudan, anu ka qbli ¶ …ĺ…ôńßaq na ka …ĺmabaŇč bńß…ôg…ô ńßnuŇč…ôdan na m…ôsa. …ĺako wa…ĺ…ô mijan ¶b…ôo w…ô t…ô…ĺu ba kl…ôgan, kika bńß…ôg…ô, tanańß ma qalux, ani si niqan ka mgsama du…ĺi m…ôsa ka duma …ĺudan. …ĺako tanańß w…ô nuŇčalan tp…ôlaq, …ĺako qalux w…ô kn…ĺ…ôbu dńß…ô…ĺan mqalux, m…ôniq ka …ĺako mgsama w…ô nuŇčalan waso s…ô…ĺo. pt…ôumal pptasun tiwas pawan,iwan lawa,s…ôta iban ma …ĺobo pińßu ka smn…ô…ô…ĺu dakis pawan ka smnn…ôtu…ĺ
S.FORM: = Rungeung = Ngayan qhuni ka rungeung nii, qhuni rungeung nii we leexan riyung ngungalan, ado ka hmeru ssiyo deriq ma ayu alang ma, ani knuwan saan gmeyu ge niqan. Kika qbulic qhuni rungeung nii ka ngalan miyan mpbhege ware ttinun ka yami Seediq, rudan rungeung nii de mqhuni paru duri denu, malu riyung srehaq duri. Mpbhege ware Cbeyo we uka miyan iyu mpsrako ware ka yami Seediq,ani si niqan knkela na ka rudan miyan, meniq ka ware bhege we snpuwan daha hmanguc qbulic rungeung. Mosa gmeyu qhuni rungeung mdengu hayan ma pthuun daha, sliyan hii ka qbulic na ma spuun hmanguc qbulic nii ka nuqah qnqihan, kika mbhege ka nuqah qnqihan denu. Rako ware nSeediq Rheqan ka rehaq na rungeung de pthuun mesa duma rudan ma, ani naq ini rheqi mesa ka duma rudan, anu ka qblic rehaq na ka rmabang bhege hnungedan na mesa. Rako ware miyan cbeyo we teru ba klegan, kika bhege, tanah ma qalux, ani si niqan ka mgsama duri mesa ka duma rudan. Rako tanah we nungalan tpelaq, rako qalux we knrebu dheran mqalux, meniq ka rako mgsama we nungalan waso sero. Pteumal pptasun Tiwas Pawan,Iwan Lawa,Seta Iban ma Robo Pihu ka smneeru Dakis Pawan ka smnnetur
